title: crotalaria stuhlmannii
intro: Crotalaria stuhlmannii is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is native to tropical Africa and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin disorders, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Crotalaria stuhlmannii is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its extracts have been used in traditional medicine to promote health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving wound healing.
